SessionStart.description: Detect whether this project has a tailored Forge harness (.claude/.forge.json); if absent, nudge Claude to offer /harness-init. Detect-only: never writes, fail-open.

PreToolUse.description: GLOBAL SAFETY: block edits that MODIFY an existing linter/formatter/tsconfig config (fix the code, not the config). First-time creation is allowed. Fail-open.
GLOBAL SAFETY (security module): flag obvious hard-coded secrets in file content or shell commands and block the write; steer to env vars / secret stores. Fail-open.
GLOBAL SAFETY: block git hook-bypass attempts (--no-verify, -c core.hooksPath=). Git/CI hooks must not be skipped. Fail-open.

PROJECT-GATED (only when .claude/.forge.json exists): on the FIRST edit/write to a file this session, require the agent to cite the rule/spec/BR-ID the change implements. No-op in non-tailored projects. Fail-open.

TELEMETRY (opt-in, default OFF): emit-only PreToolUse observer for agent/skill STARTS (agent.invoke/skill.invoke). Records prompt length + sha256 only, NEVER the prompt. No-op when telemetry is off; never denies; fail-open.

PROJECT-GATED (loops module): unattended execution (claude -p, nohup claude, crontab, gh workflow run) should reference a registered .claude/loops/ definition. REPORT-ONLY by default (steer to stderr); FORGE_LOOP_GATE=enforce flips to deny. No-op when .claude/loops/ absent or project not forge-tailored. Fail-open.

Stop.description: PROJECT-GATED (only when .claude/.forge.json exists): run the project's typecheck (from .forge.json/profile-project.json or detected) once per turn at Stop; report failures so 'done' is backed by a fresh check. No-op if no typecheck resolves. Never blocks; fail-open.

PROJECT-GATED (loops module): if the same gate-shaped command (test/lint/typecheck/build) ran >=3 times this turn, emit ONE stderr nudge to codify it as a ratchet/loop (rule of three, loop-discipline.md). Never blocks; once per turn; fail-open.
